summary: Made two surgical seam edits: re-anchored the opening in the riverbank collapse and linked the blackboard headings to Nura's carryover questions from Chapter 12, then added a brief return-to-the-mat beat at the end so Chapter 14's aftermath opening lands cleanly.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to begin with the collapsing riverbank outside rather than another schoolroom-first setup.
Linked the blackboard headings to the questions Nura carried out of Chapter 12.
Added a final sentence sending Halima back to the mat after witnessing households being physically split apart.
